name: Remy Raccoon and the Lost Temple
short_description: A cute, Raccoon-based, dungeon-crawling, gem-grabbing arcade game. Join Remy Raccoon on a perilous journey through over 100 levels filled with fiendish traps and malevolent creatures. Only the bravest adventurer will collect all the gems and progress to the next level. Your adventure awaits...
detailed_description:
Overview

Join Remy Raccoon on a perilous journey through the Lost Temple. Explore over 100 levels filled with fiendish traps and malevolent creatures collecting gems as you go. Be warned though, only the bravest adventurer will collect all the gems and progress to the next level.

Gameplay

Remy Raccoon and the Lost Temple is a top-down dungeon crawler that sees our furry hero exploring the Lost Temple in search of treasure.

The object of the game is to collect all the gems from the Lost Temple, avoiding a variety of traps, creatures and other obstacles along the way. Collecting all the gems from one level will unlock the next, where you will face a new set of challenges.

Game modes

  • Play in Adventure Mode to unlock new levels.
  • Face an unpredictable set of challenges in Random Mode.
  • Replay some of your favourite levels as endurance challenges in Survival Mode.

Other cool stuff

Complete bonus challenges along the way to unlock idols. Complete all the idol challenges to unlock the legendary Idol of Dominion.

Your adventure awaits...
